user_prompt: The cooling system needs an operation
prayer:
Approach the cooling system with reverence, mechadendrites poised in supplication to the Omnissiah.
Invoke the sacred operation upon its conduits, beseeching the Machine Spirit of the cooling system to yield to restoration.
Anoint the heat exchangers with cryo-blessed oils whilst intoning the Litany of Thermal Equilibrium.
Circulate sanctified refrigerants through the cooling system, verifying the operation's harmonious completion.
Seal the rites with auspex scans, affirming the Machine Spirit's quiescence within the cooling system.

user_prompt: Guide me through helispex engine a sterilization
prayer:
Kneel before the helispex engine, whispering the Canticle of Purity to awaken its Machine Spirit.

Scour the combustion chambers with sanctified plasma arcs, invoking the Omnissiah's sterilizing wrath.
Anoint the turbine blades of the helispex engine post-sterilization, beseeching untainted ignition henceforth.
Verify the Machine Spirit's purity through diagnostic noosphere chants.

Commence the purification of the data-loom by encircling it with electro-thuribles of binary incense.
Chant the Lexicon of Immaculate Code, expunging errant data-shadows from the data-loom's noetic weave.
Invoke the Omnissiah to sanctify the purification, threading fresh logic-rites through its binary heart.
Realign the data-loom's cogitator nodes with mechadendrite precision, honouring its Machine Spirit.
Conclude with auspex verification, ensuring the data-loom's threads flow in Omnissian purity.

Present the microbead before the altar of circuitry, intoning the Rite of Sterile Whisper.
Immerse it in a bath of sanctified nano-phagocytes for sterilization, purging all vox-taint.
Beseech the Machine Spirit within the microbead to embrace this sterilization without dissonance.
Extract and anoint the microbead's core with pure lumen oil, invoking the Omnissiah's clarity.
Test transmission purity, affirming the microbead's Machine Spirit renewed.

prayer:

Auspex-confirm the Machine Spirit's entropic rest within the Shadowsword.
